posts.text: Our philosophy on data — One thing I’ve picked up over time is checking app permissions before installing anything. Quoting @nithin ’s tweet : Whenever I’m at events or am meeting young entrepreneurs through Rainmatter, the one recurring question I get is what makes Zerodha what it is. We’d created this page to explain what makes us different. Link in comments. zerodha.com Product and business philosophies No pushing, spamming, or annoying with gimmicks. Philosophies and practices that drive us at Zerodha.
